creator: vvelox@vvelox.net
text:
"security/pam_ldap" does not build against  "openldap-client-2.4.25_1".

How-To-Repeat: 

[root@vixen42]/arc/src/ports/security/pam_ldap# lsipkg openldap
openldap-client-2.4.25_1
openldap-server-2.4.25
[root@vixen42]/arc/src/ports/security/pam_ldap# make
